h1.visual_description: Not visible on this page; likely a large, bold, blue-colored title for main sections or chapters.

h2.visual_description: Bold, blue sans-serif font, used for figure and table titles. Prefixed with 'Figure' or 'Table' followed by a numbering scheme.
h2.example_text: Figure 1.2. Per capita GDP growth in 2020

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Data Source Attribution (typically in grey, smaller font below graphics)
Footnote reference at the bottom of the page

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Horizontal separator line above footnotes; page number in bold blue at bottom right; document title in blue italics at bottom left.
